summary.zh: Transformer 用自注意力替代循环和卷积，成为现代基础模型的重要架构。
summary.en: The Transformer replaced recurrence and convolution with self-attention and became a key architecture for modern foundation models.

description.zh: 2017 年，Google Brain 团队提出 Transformer。它完全基于注意力机制进行序列建模，为 BERT、GPT、多模态模型和后续基础模型奠定了架构基础。
description.en: In 2017, a Google Brain team introduced the Transformer, a sequence architecture based entirely on attention mechanisms that later underpinned BERT, GPT-style models, multimodal systems, and foundation models.
